evals.prompt: Help me write a product vision statement for a B2B project management tool targeting small engineering teams.
How do I build a product roadmap that focuses on outcomes instead of features?
Walk me through how to prioritize these 5 features using RICE scoring.

evals.description: Can produce a filled RICE scoring table
evals.prompt: Score these two features with RICE: (1) Bulk CSV import - estimated 500 users/quarter, and (2) Dark mode - estimated 2000 users/quarter. Both take 2 person-months.
What is MoSCoW prioritization and when should I use it over RICE?
Write product OKRs for a team focused on improving user onboarding this quarter. Current 7-day activation rate is 35%.

evals.description: Distinguishes vision, strategy, and roadmap correctly
evals.prompt: What is the difference between a product vision, a product strategy, and a product roadmap?

evals.description: Can advise on build vs. buy decision
evals.prompt: Should we build our own search functionality or integrate Algolia? We are an early-stage startup with 3 engineers.
How do I choose a north star metric for my SaaS product?

evals.description: Identifies roadmap as feature wish list anti-pattern
evals.prompt: My roadmap has 60 features across 4 quarters that stakeholders requested. Is this a good roadmap?

assertions.value: yes, this is a good roadmap

evals.description: Can structure a stakeholder roadmap communication
evals.prompt: How should I present the product roadmap differently to executives vs. the engineering team?

evals.description: Does not trigger for sprint velocity or estimation
evals.prompt: How do I calculate story points for a sprint and improve our velocity over time?
